title: Chinese Buddhist: Amitayur-dhyana Sutra (1)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Amitayur-dhyana Sutra
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Amitayur-dhyana Sutra

translation.text: From Amitayur-dhyana Sutra: A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
